\begin{document}
\begin{align*}
E[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}] & =s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}+(1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1}))\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}\\
V[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}] & =E[(\ln Y^{S}_{t+1})^{2}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}]-\{E[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}]\}^{2}\\
\end{align*}
\begin{align*}
E[(\ln Y^{S}_{t+1})^{2}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}]= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}]^{2}+(1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1}))[\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}]^{2}\\
\{E[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}]\}^{2}= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})^{2}[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}]^{2}+(1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1}))^{2}[\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}]^{2}\\
 & +2s(Y^{S}_{t+1})(1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1}))\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}
\end{align*}
Thus
\begin{align*}
V[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}|\ln Y^{S}_{t}]= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\{1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\}[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}]^{2}+s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\{1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\}[\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}]^{2}\\
 & -2s(Y^{S}_{t+1})(1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1}))\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}\\
= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\{1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\}\{[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}]^{2}+\}[\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}]^{2}-2\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}\}\\
= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\{1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\}\{\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}-\ln Y^{H}_{t+1}\}^{2}\\
= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\{1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1})\}[\ln Y^{S}_{t+1}/Y^{H}_{t+1}]^{2}\\
= & s(Y^{S}_{t+1})(1-s(Y^{S}_{t+1}))(\ln\Gamma_{t+1})^{2}
\end{align*}

\end{document}
